body: cycle-1 review-spec REQUEST_CHANGES → addressed all 4 substantive findings: MEDIUM (ac-03 extended to read design-note.md + verification + self-reference note); LOW (ac-02 'not configured' tightened to defer to audit_topology(...).configured + 4th verification case for config-present-but-docs.topology-absent); LOW (ac-01 added parent-dir creation clause + verification case for nested target path); LOW (ac-04 locked --no-nudge flag name + stderr render target).
